name: pensyve
description: Persistent memory for Codex — your agent remembers decisions, patterns, and context across sessions

interface.shortDescription: Cross-session memory runtime for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Give your Codex agent persistent memory that survives across sessions. Pensyve stores decisions, patterns, preferences, and outcomes — and retrieves the right context at the right time with 8-signal fusion ranking.
defaultPrompt: What do you remember about this project?
Remember that we decided to use Postgres for production.
Review my memory health and suggest cleanup.
